channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Il connecte son bracelet connecté à son agenda pour classer ses collègues les plus stressants
item.description: Un développeur a relié son bracelet Whoop à son agenda pro pour savoir quel collègue lui fait monter le rythme cardiaque. Résultat : un classement des réunions les plus stressantes.

item.title: « Ça ne peut plus continuer comme ça » : face à la crise, Xbox prépare un énième plan de licenciement
item.description: Tirant un bilan assez critique de sa situation sur le marché, la division jeu vidéo de chez Microsoft préparerait un énorme « reset » qui se traduirait d’abord et avant tout par un prochain plan de licenciement.

item.title: Il fait tourner une IA de 27 milliards de paramètres chez lui pour 235 euros
item.description: Un blogueur a réussi à faire tourner un modèle d'IA de 27 milliards de paramètres chez lui, pour 200 livres. Sa recette : une carte graphique de datacenter détournée, sans connecteur PCIe ni sortie écran.

item.title: LibreOffice slams rival Euro-Office as a 'de facto ally' of Microsoft lock-in — as concerns over possible Russian interference rise
item.description: LibreOffice slates Euro-Office for using Microsoft's proprietary OOXML format, as reports reveal its Russian dependency.

item.title: Decathlon ôte déjà 400 € à son nouveau VTTAE Stilus OffRoad+ offrant jusqu’à 110 km d’autonomie
item.description: Endurant, puissant et pensé pour les randonnées, le VTT électrique Decathlon Stilus OffRoad+ a été lancé il y a quelques mois. Mais on le trouve déjà affiché en promotion à 1 799,99 euros au lieu de 2 199,99 euros sur le site officiel.

item.title: Peacock Promo Codes: 40% Off June 2026
item.description: Stream your favorite shows for up to $80 off this month, and save on subscription plans with the latest Peacock TV coupons from WIRED.

item.title: Nike Promo Codes and Discounts: 30% for June 2026
item.description: Check out our deals for Nike this June 2026, including 15% off select purchases.

item.title: Home Depot Promo Codes: 50% Off in June 2026
item.description: Save up to 50% today with the latest Home Depot promo codes for appliances, power tools, and more this June.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | June 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and 50% off DashPass for students and select users.

item.title: Dell Coupon Codes: 20% Off for June 2026
item.description: Get 20% off with verified Dell promo code, plus today’s coupons for up to $600 off laptops, Alienware monitors, and all things tech.

item.title: Chewy Promo Codes: $20 Off June 2026
item.description: Explore Chewy coupon codes for $30 off, $20 off your first order $49, 50% off pet food, and more June 2026 discounts.

item.title: 30% VistaPrint Coupon & Promo Codes | June 2026
item.description: From personalized gifts to business essentials, WIRED can help you save with our selection of VistaPrint promo codes.

item.title: Newegg Promo Code: 10% Off in June 2026
item.description: Enjoy up to 10% off your entire order with today’s Newegg promo code and discount codes. Save with the latest deals for gaming PCs, laptops, and computer parts.

item.title: AT&T Promo Codes: $50 Off This June 2026
item.description: Whether you’re looking to upgrade your internet or get the latest phone, we’ve got you covered with our selection of AT&T coupons and deals.

item.title: Squarespace Promo Codes: 20% Off in June 2026
item.description: Get 20% off your next website, 10% off with exclusive Squarespace discount code, 50% off plans, and more top coupons from WIRED.

item.title: 30% Off Samsung Promo Code | June 2026
item.description: Save 30% or 10% with Samsung coupon codes, up to $1,000 on appliances, plus limited-time deals on the Galaxy Z Fold7, Flip7, and S25.

item.title: Dyson Promo Codes: 25% Off in June 2026
item.description: Get 25% off with a Dyson coupon code, plus save up to $600 with discounts on vacuums, $150 off Airwraps, and more.

item.title: Why being lazy is a superpower
item.description: Research suggests that strategic breaks can improve problem-solving and increase long-term productivity. There’s an art to doing nothing and I have spent years trying to perfect it.

item.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
item.description: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

item.title: How to watch South Korea vs. Czechia online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream South Korea vs. Czechia in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.
